description: Otimização de GCode e fatiamento: BED_MESH, PA, temperatura, pipeline completo

optimize_gcode.description: Otimiza GCode: injeta BED_MESH_CALIBRATE, SET_PRESSURE_ADVANCE, corrige temperaturas

slice_stl.description: Fatia STL usando PrusaSlicer CLI com config .slicer_config/full_config.ini

run_pipeline.description: Executa pipeline completo: slice -> optimize -> analyze -> upload

analyze_gcode.description: Analisa GCode: verifica temperatura, BED_MESH, PA, layers, Z-max
